name: Bristleback
description: It was a barkeep that got me into this mess. Yeah, I think I'll pay em a visit when this is done.

15.left: +8% Bristleback Back Damage Reduction +4% Bristleback Side Damage Reduction

25.left: +18 Warpath Attack Damage Bonus per Stack

abilities.name: Prickly
abilities.description: Grants both outgoing damage amplification and debuff duration amplification against enemy units behind Bristleback Damage Amp: 1.045 0.005. Debuff Duration Factor: 1.045 0.005.

abilities.name: Viscous Nasal Goo
abilities.description: Having caught a cold while stuck in the snow, Bristleback turns it to his advantage. Cast Range: 650 (900). Projectile Speed: 1000. Base Armor Reduction: 1.5/2/2.5/3. Armor Reduction per Stack: 2/2.5/3/3.5. Base Move Speed Slow: 12%. Move Speed Slow per Stack: 3%/6%/9%/12%. Cooldown: 1.75. Mana Cost: 12/16/20/24.

abilities.name: Quill Spray
abilities.description: Sprays enemy units with quills dealing damage in an area of effect around Rigwarl. Deals additional bonus damage per current stack on the debuff-affected enemy unit. Radius: 700. Projectile Speed: 2400. Max Damage: 500. Base Damage: 25/45/65/85. Stack Damage: 30 (50). Duration: 14. Cooldown: 3. Mana Cost: 35.

abilities.name: Bristleback
abilities.description: If Rigwarl takes up to a certain amount of damage from the rear, he releases a Quill Spray of its corresponding level. While active, he is disarmed, applies a self movement speed slow, with his facing angle locked, and cannot turn. Rear Damage Reduction: 16%/24%/32%/40% (24%/32%/40%/48%). Side Damage Reduction: 8%/12%/16%/20% (12%/16%/20%/24%). Damage Threshold: 275/250/225/200 (250/225/200/175). Min Release Interval: 0.1 Counter Duration: Min Release Interval: 0.1. Cast Range: Global.

abilities.name: Hairball
abilities.description: Applies Viscous Nasal Goo stacks of its corresponding level. Cast Range: 750. Radius: 700. Projectile Speed: 2400. Projectile Speed: 1000. Cooldown: 13. Mana Cost: 60.

abilities.name: Warpath
abilities.description: Grants self flat bonus attack damage and bonus movement speed every time Rigwarl casts a spell. Attack Damage Bonus per Stack: 15/20/25 (33/38/43). Move Speed Bonus per Stack: 2%/2.5%/3%. Stack Duration: 16/18/20.
